commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server event projector so native webSearch items derive tool progress, after_tool_call params, result metadata, and display meta from Codex action metadata instead of empty top-level query strings.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection of current main plus the upstream Codex protocol shows webSearch.action metadata exists and current main drops it when item.query is empty.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer-owned draft needs focused validation and explicit acceptance of the hook telemetry payload compatibility change; no mechanical repair is indicated.

target.title: fix(codex): preserve native web search action metadata
target.body:
Summary
- Preserve available Codex-native web search action metadata in tool progress / `after_tool_call` telemetry.
- Use action query/queries when the top-level query is empty, and emit `queryUnavailable` instead of an empty-string query when the provider exposes no useful query.
- Keep #85346's behavior that native web searches are not mirrored into transcript snapshots.

Verification
Behavior addressed: follow-up to #85346 / #85109; native Codex web search no longer reports empty query or status-only result metadata to tool-progress hooks when action metadata is available.
Real environment tested: not completed; remote runners are blocked in this shell.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm test:serial extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts"`; `../crabbox/bin/crabbox run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm test:serial extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts"`
Evidence after fix: diff check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings. Blacksmith Testbox failed before execution because `blacksmith auth login` is required. AWS Crabbox failed before execution because AWS credentials / IMDS role are unavailable.
Observed result after fix: code review is clean, but no remote test command executed.
What was not tested: focused Codex projector Vitest test and changed gate on Crabbox/Testbox; live Codex app-server run with real native web search.

Refs #85109
Follows #85346
target.author: vincentkoc
